title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in West Farms, Bronx | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in West Farms, Bronx. Safe, humane bat control for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call for fast service!
intro: West Farms residents facing bat infestations need professional, humane removal services that comply with wildlife protection laws. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in safe bat exclusion and remediation for West Farms homes, apartment buildings, and commercial properties. Our certified technicians use proven methods to remove bats and prevent their return to your Bronx property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving West Farms and the greater Bronx area with humane, effective bat removal solutions. Our licensed wildlife specialists use state-of-the-art exclusion techniques and provide comprehensive attic restoration, ensuring your West Farms property remains bat-free with full warranty protection.
localContext: West Farms' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes near the Bronx Zoo, and structures along the Bronx River Parkway often attract bats seeking shelter in attics, eaves, and wall voids. The neighborhood's proximity to green spaces and the Bronx River creates ideal conditions for bat populations, making professional exclusion services essential for property owners in the area.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in West Farms, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in West Farms typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of damage. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New York City?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bats are protected wildlife in New York, so removal must be done humanely using exclusion methods rather than extermination. Best Pest Control NYC follows all NYC and state regulations, using one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not re-enter during appropriate seasons.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my West Farms home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark stains near entry points, accumulation of guano (droppings) in attics or on exterior walls, and seeing bats enter or exit your property at twilight. A strong ammonia-like odor may also indicate a bat colony.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in West Farms?
faqs.answer: The exclusion process typically takes 3-7 days for device installation, followed by a 3-7 day monitoring period to ensure all bats have exited. Complete exclusion, cleanup, and sealing usually takes 2-3 weeks total, depending on colony size and property conditions. We cannot perform exclusions during maternity season (May-August) when flightless pups are present.
